incident_summary: Granule moisture content 5.4% exceeded validated limit of 3.5% for batch D6291B. Drying endpoint not met — drying step terminated early by operator.
root_cause_detail: Operator terminated drying at fixed time rather than verifying moisture content as required by SOP. Drying endpoint is moisture-based, not time-based per validated procedure.
corrective_action: Additional drying cycle performed. Moisture re-tested and passed at 2.8%. Batch released after QA review. Operator retrained on drying endpoint determination.
preventive_action: EBR updated — drying step cannot be marked complete until moisture content result entered and confirmed within specification. Fixed-time drying not permitted.
effectiveness_check: Zero moisture OOS events at granulation for 12 months. 100% drying endpoint test compliance on monthly process audit.
